title: Health and Safety Engineers, Except Mining Safety Engineers and Inspectors
description: Promote worksite or product safety by applying knowledge of industrial processes, mechanics, chemistry, psychology, and industrial health and safety laws. Includes industrial product safety engineers.

tasks.text: Investigate industrial accidents, injuries, or occupational diseases to determine causes and preventive measures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research to evaluate safety levels for products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate product designs for safety.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct or coordinate worker training in areas such as safety laws and regulations, hazardous condition monitoring, and use of safety equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain and apply knowledge of current policies, regulations, and industrial processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend procedures for detection, prevention, and elimination of physical, chemical, or other product hazards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Report or review findings from accident investigations, facilities inspections, or environmental testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate potential health hazards or damage that could occur from product misuse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate adequacy of actions taken to correct health inspection violations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Interpret safety regulations for others interested in industrial safety, such as safety engineers, labor representatives, and safety inspectors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review plans and specifications for construction of new machinery or equipment to determine whether all safety requirements have been met.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in preparation of product usage and precautionary label instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview employers and employees to obtain information about work environments and workplace incidents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide expert testimony in litigation cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review employee safety programs to determine their adequacy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct or direct testing of air quality, noise, temperature, or radiation levels to verify compliance with health and safety regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical advice and guidance to organizations on how to handle health-related problems and make needed changes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop industry standards of product safety.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain liaisons with outside organizations, such as fire departments, mutual aid societies, and rescue teams, so that emergency responses can be facilitated.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct industrial hygiene research.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile, analyze, and interpret statistical data related to occupational illnesses and accidents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Write and revise safety regulations and codes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with medical professionals to assess health risks and to develop ways to manage health issues and concerns.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and build safety equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check floors of plants to ensure that they are strong enough to support heavy machinery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect facilities, machinery, or safety equipment to identify and correct potential hazards, and to ensure safety regulation compliance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Install safety devices on machinery or direct device installation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
